suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a manual-review fallback path for scrutiny validators when `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` Task launches fail, including which review artifacts to write and how to record the infrastructure problem in synthesis output.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: This polish rerun also failed to launch `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` because the Task path exited with `Invalid model: custom:GPT-5.4-(XHigh)-3`, so the validator had to inspect the fix transcript and diff manually and write the review JSON itself.
